parameters.name: Launcher args
parameters.description: Optional flags for code/launch_beaker.py. Leave blank to create the MVP W&B sweep and submit it to Beaker.
parameters.help_text:
This capsule is the AI Hub / Beaker control plane. A Reproducible Run creates a W&B sweep from code/beaker/sweep_mvp.yaml, saves a reproducibility record to /results (sweep YAML + SWEEP_ID + dispatcher commit), then renders the SWEEP_ID into code/beaker/experiment_mvp.yaml and submits it to Beaker.

Leave blank for the default (create sweep + submit). Flags:
    --no-submit              create the sweep + record only (do not submit to Beaker)
    --sweep <file>           sweep spec (default: code/beaker/sweep_mvp.yaml)
    --experiment <file>      Beaker spec (default: code/beaker/experiment_mvp.yaml)
    --workspace <ai1/...>    Beaker workspace

Prereq (once per workspace): store the W&B key as a Beaker secret — see code/beaker/README.md.

The historical Code Ocean compute path (compose Hydra config) now lives in code/launch_CO_wrapper.py.
